name: Fresh Cherry Bread
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups King Arthur Unbleached All-Purpose Flour
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Grease a 9 x 5-inch loaf pan.
3. Cream the butter and sugar together until light and fluffy.
4. Add eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
5. Stir in vanilla extract.
6. In a separate bowl, mix together flour, coriander or cardamom, salt, and baking powder.
7. Gradually add the dry ingredients to the butter mixture, alternating with milk (if using), mixing until just combined.
8. Fold in cherries until evenly distributed.
9. Pour batter into prepared loaf pan.
10. Bake for 45 - 55 minutes, or until a skewer inserted into the center comes out clean.
11. Allow bread to cool in the pan for 10 minutes before turning out onto a rack to finish cooling.
12. Best served the next day.
